default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, holiday strategy, and 2026 planning.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Holiday Publishing:** Publish content through the break to build SEO history, as early indexing provides a long-term advantage.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [**Content Backlog:** GrowthX will prioritize 20 articles from the 50-piece backlog based on business value, enabling SchoolAI to focus educator reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [**2026 Strategy:** Shift to a 100% editorial model, dropping PSEO. The focus will be on the Q1 Browser Extension launch and new LLM visibility experiments.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [**Key Messaging Change:** The "Chrome extension" is now the "Browser extension" to reflect multi-browser compatibility.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

## Topics

### Holiday Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The education industry is shut down for the holidays, raising questions about publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [**Decision:** Continue publishing to build SEO history.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Early indexing provides a long-term advantage, as SEO results take 3–6 months to materialize.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [**Workflow Constraint:** Framer lacks a scheduling feature, requiring manual publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [**Workaround:** SchoolAI will publish in batches at their convenience.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [**Future Improvement:** GrowthX will explore automating the staging process in Webflow to streamline the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### Content Backlog Prioritization

  - [**Problem:** A 50-article backlog awaits educator review, stalled by team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will prioritize the backlog to focus SchoolAI's review efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [**Priority Criteria:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
        1.  [**Business Value:** Attract high-intent users.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
        2.  [**SEO Metrics:** Search volume and keyword difficulty.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will deliver a prioritized list of 20 articles for review in January.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

### Research Report SEO Strategy

  - [**Opportunity:** Promote the upcoming "AI and Critical Thinking" research report.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Keyword:** "AI and critical thinking" was chosen for its strong SEO potential, as it ranks well against non-resource content.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**Content:** A "TLDR" blog post on the website with a PDF download button.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**Timeline:** The post will be queued for creation the week of Jan 5th to support the Jan 8th PR launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [**Future Reports:** SchoolAI will investigate publishing a past Stanford research study on their site.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

### 2026 Product Strategy & Messaging

  - [**Q1 Focus:** A major launch campaign for the Browser Extension (late Jan/early Feb).](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
      - [**Messaging Shift:** From "Chrome extension" to "Browser extension" to reflect multi-browser compatibility.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [**Launch Strategy:** Position as the official "real release" after a prior announcement lacked a live product.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [**2026 Roadmap:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
      - [**Student Product:** An AI tutor targeting parents and high school students.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**Admin Product:** New functionality for existing admin personas.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
      - [**Status:** Both are in development with design partners; timelines are fuzzy.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

### 2026 Contract Renewal

  - [**Context:** The contract auto-renews in February.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [**Proposed Change:** Switch from the current PSEO model to a 100% editorial model (10 pieces/week).](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [**Rationale:** SchoolAI confirmed this aligns with their preference.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [**New Interest:** SchoolAI expressed interest in:](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [A Reddit strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [LLM visibility experiments.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [**GrowthX Response:** GrowthX will explore a framework-based experiment to improve LLM visibility for low-ranking queries (e.g., 0–2% visibility).](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [Send 10 January topics by EOD Dec 19.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [Deliver a prioritized list of 20 backlog articles in early January.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Queue the "AI and Critical Thinking" blog post for the week of Jan 5.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [Prepare a renewal presentation for early January, proposing a 100% editorial model and LLM experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [**SchoolAI:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [Review and approve January topics next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [Begin educator review of the prioritized 20 articles in January.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Investigate publishing the Stanford research study.](https://fathom.video/share/Ji8gRSWWDXCUoxu4wpXHBYR1NXMT5tNz?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
